name: Redox Limited
analysis: RDX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.7700. Trade idea: entry A$3.9100, stop A$3.1581, target A$6.1657 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
